topic: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While)

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I drink both tea and coffee. I was tired, but I finished the work. Would you like tea or coffee? I was late, so I left quickly. I came late because there was traffic.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Although he was tired, he kept working. I was cooking while she was studying. She is smart and hardworking. I like this, but it is expensive. You can go now or later.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "बारिश हो रही थी, इसलिए हम अंदर रुके।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: It was raining, so we stayed inside.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "I were late, so I left quickly."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I was late, so I left quickly.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Although the weather was bad, we traveled. I was studying while he was sleeping. We were happy and excited. This is good, but it can be improved.
